name: Crypto Price Prediction
description: AI-powered crypto price prediction patterns: feature engineering from OHLCV data, ensemble model approaches (LSTM, gradient boosting, transformer), regime detection, prediction confidence scoring, and backtesting validation.
prompt: AI-powered crypto price prediction patterns: feature engineering from OHLCV data, ensemble model approaches (LSTM, gradient boosting, transformer), regime detection, prediction confidence scoring, and backtesting validation. Uses existing TA engine data as input features.
